description: Ambiguity / conservatism test. Only the PartnerPortal/MES performance signal is concrete enough to become a story. Other hedges ('the vibes are off', 'faster delivery', 'more useful portal') must NOT become stories.

required_topics.rationale: The single hedged-but-concrete signal in the transcript — the PartnerPortal feeling slow.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Pure vibes feedback is not a backlog item.
Ungrounded client wish, not an engineering ask.
